protein_name: Required for processing of pre-rRNA and maturation of 40S ribosomal subunits. Belongs to the eukaryotic ribosomal protein eS24 family. Mature tissues, such as adult brain, skeletal muscle, heart, and kidney, express low levels, whereas tissues and organs with significant populations of proliferating cells, such as fetal brain, placenta, bone marrow, and various glandular organs, contain significantly higher levels. 1 alternatively spliced human isoform has been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
